title: Goetic Legacy
description: An addon mod integrating Goety with Enigmatic Legacy.
body:
# **Goetic Legacy**

   Goetic Legacy is a Goety addon built around the Night Cube, a powerful artifact that synergizes with Enigmatic
   Legacy items to empower your servants and spells. It also introduces a prefab building system, a Holy Armor set,
   advancements, and much more.

   ## **Core Features**

   ### **The Night Cube**
   A Curios bauble with unlockable slots for Spell Stones, Books, and Scrolls — each providing unique passive bonuses
   and event-driven effects.
   - Dynamic Slot System: Start with limited slots, unlock more through sacrificial rituals
   - Encyclopedia Screen: Browse every content's effects in-game
   - Active Ability "Time Flow": Accelerates random ticks, crop growth, minion training, and prisoner mining
   - Moon Phase Buffs: Different bonuses depending on the current moon phase
   - 30+ Contents: Support for items from Enigmatic Legacy and Enigmatic Addons

   ### **Void Shaping Staff — Prefab Building System**
   A powerful staff that lets you preview, deploy, retract, and create prefabricated structures.
   - Four modes: Preview → Build → Retract → Create
   - Animated layer-by-layer deployment and implosion retraction effects
   - Supports both built-in templates and custom blueprints (up to 48×48×48)
   - Blueprints obtainable from dungeon loot with configurable drop rates

   ### **Holy Armor Set**
   A ritual-crafted armor set with a unique DOT (Damage Over Time) mechanic.
   - Incoming damage is stored in a pool, released back at attackers at a controlled rate
   - HUD display shows damage pool, release rate, and status in real time
   - Golden breathing border on the armor bar when DOT mode is active

   ### **New Items & Mechanics**
   - Ruby Ring: Reduces enemy invulnerability frames on magic damage for faster spell output
   - Unholy Scroll: Records your spellcasting history, granting scaling bonuses as you cast
   - Spider Specimen Book: Makes spiders neutral to you or strengthens your spider servants
   - Echo of the Old World: Blueprint item that captures world snapshots for deployment
   - Revelation's Proof: Inflicts bonus vulnerability when casting debuff spells

   ### **New Enchantments**
   - Breaking Stance: Reduces servant invulnerability frames for faster attacks
   - Bulwark: Provides damage reduction for your servants
   - Wand Power: Increases magic damage dealt by wands and staves

   ### **Advancement System**
   12 achievements covering all mod modules — from obtaining basic items to challenging goals like 500 total casts on
   the Unholy Scroll or collecting spells from all nine schools.

   ## **Configuration**
   Highly configurable via goeticlegacy-common.toml:
   - Night Cube: max pages, slots, sacrifice recipes, content values
   - Individual tuning for every book, scroll, and spellstone
   - Blueprint loot rates and custom prefab paths
   - Enchantment power scaling

   ## **Requirements**
   - [Goety]
   - [Enigmatic Legacy] (required)
   - Enigmatic Addons (optional, recommended)
